sigWerErrors.reason: Substituting 'i' with 'that' changes the subject of the sentence, altering who is being referred to. This significantly changes the meaning of the sentence.
'am going to' and 'will' both express future intent, so this is a minor difference in phrasing with the same meaning in context.
